properties.titulo_evento: Cuba thanks China for rice shipment amid worsening humanitarian conditions
properties.descricao: The Caribbean island has faced a fuel blockade that has cut off essential supplies, as Trump seeks regime change.

properties.titulo_evento: Pakistan’s Eid livestock traders losing as war on Iran pushes up prices
properties.descricao: Livestock traders in Pakistan say the war on Iran has hurt their sales ahead of Eid al-Adha.

properties.titulo_evento: ‘Trump needs a deal, no matter how bad it is’
properties.descricao: Harlan Ullman argues that US President Donald Trump is chasing any Iran deal to relieve mounting pressure at home.

properties.titulo_evento: How will Iran war fallout impact upcoming US elections?
properties.descricao: Trump purges Republican critics, but are the prospects for his party in upcoming elections heading up or down?

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli strikes kill six in southern Lebanon amid fresh evacuation orders
properties.descricao: Israel's attacks in southern Lebanon are expanding despite supposed ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: Zelenskyy speaks to Al Jazeera at site of major Russian attacks in Kyiv
properties.descricao: Russia has launched one of its largest attacks on Kyiv since the war began, firing hundreds of drones and missiles.

properties.titulo_evento: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
properties.descricao: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.

properties.titulo_evento: Rubio meets Modi during India visit with energy high on agenda
properties.descricao: The secretary of state wants to sell US energy to Delhi to make up for shortfalls caused by the Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated' including reopening Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Tehran also signals progress on talks but says the key issue of nuclear weapons is not part of an initial framework it is working on.

properties.titulo_evento: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
properties.descricao: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

properties.titulo_evento: 'We don't know what the death toll among military personnel is': Kyiv reels from Russian strikes
properties.descricao: FRANCE 24 correspondent Gulliver Cragg reports from Kyiv on Russia's latest deadly drone and missile strike against Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: Tearful Kostyuk speaks of Ukraine missile attack after 'most difficult' French Open win
properties.descricao: An emotional Marta Kostyuk fought back tears after her first-round win at the French Open on Sunday as she told the Roland Garros crowd about waking up to news that a Russian missile had struck near her parents' home in Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: 'Time is on our side': Trump tempers expectations of a peace deal with Iran
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump on Sunday said that he had told diplomatic representatives not to "rush into a deal" with Tehran to end the US-Israeli war on Iran, walking back earlier signals of progress towards a peace agreement. The draft agreement wou...

properties.titulo_evento: No Alcaraz, no party? Five reasons not to miss this year’s French Open
properties.descricao: There will be no repeat of last year’s epic, see-sawing final between Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner at the French Open this year, with the Spanish title holder nursing an injury. But there is still plenty to look forward to on the Paris clay, fro...

properties.titulo_evento: US-Iran closing in on deal to end war: Trump says it could reopen Hormuz
properties.descricao: Jennifer Gavito, Former US State Department official, Senior Advisor, The Cohen Group, is our guest.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump administration eyes Cuba after Venezuela raid and turns up pressure
properties.descricao: Andrés Pertierra, PhD candidate in Latin American & Cuban history, University of Wisconsin-Madison, is our guest.

properties.titulo_evento: War in Ukraine: Russia launches massive missile strike on Kyiv
properties.descricao: Macron, EU’s Kallas condemn Russian attack on Ukraine with Oreshnik ballistic missile.

properties.titulo_evento: Cuba receives China rice shipment amid US threats, blackouts
properties.descricao: Chinese aid is expected to alleviate food shortages in Cuba. But the island's economic crisis continues with blackouts and oil embargos are compunded by threats from the United States.

properties.titulo_evento: China mine blast: Search and investigation continue
properties.descricao: Chinese authorities have launched an investigation into "serious breaches" of security regulations after an explosion in a coal mine left at least 82 people dead. Two people remain missing.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia uses hypersonic Oreshnik missile in Kyiv attack
properties.descricao: Russia carried out a massive drone and missile attack on the capital, Kyiv, and its surrounding region overnight, killing at least four people. France and Germany have condemned Moscow's use of the Oreshnik missile.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Most doubt Bundeswehr military readiness — poll
properties.descricao: A new poll shows widespread doubts about Germany's defense readiness, with stronger fears over cyber threats than military attack. Meanwhile, a record number of people obtained a German passport in 2025. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Trump says US won't 'rush into' deal with Tehran
properties.descricao: The US president says negotiations are proceeding in "an orderly and constructive manner," while Iranian officials say key differences still need to be settled. Follow DW for more.

properties.titulo_evento: Zelenskyy rejects Merz proposal for associate EU membership
properties.descricao: "Ukraine’s place in the European Union must also be complete — full and equal," Ukrainian leader says.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia batters Kyiv with massive missile and drone attack
properties.descricao: Moscow used some 600 drones and 30 missiles, including at least one Oreshnik, a powerful hypersonic ballistic missile that is capable of carrying nuclear weapons, Ukraine's air force said.

properties.titulo_evento: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Fall: Trump Says No 'Rush' For Iran Deal
Oil Prices Fall on News of Possible Iran Deal
properties.descricao: S&P 500 futures were up slightly in what may be a sign that investors and analysts are waiting to see if a deal is finalized.
